content: STCA (Short-Term Conflict Alert, EUROCONTROL/SKYbrary standard) is a decision-support tool, not automatic separation enforcement: it predicts separation-minima infringement within a short lookahead (commonly ~2 minutes) and alerts via a visual cue (special symbol, blinking target/datablock, violation graphic connecting the two tracks, velocity-vector-based conflict prediction, distinct alert color e.g. red/amber) plus an audible alarm. It is explicitly a concept with varying implementations, not a single spec — false positives/negatives are an accepted tradeoff of the lookahead window.
